description: File-based agile PM — phases are sprints, ceremonies are Claude prompts, this manifest is the source of truth.

phases.name: ceremonies
phases.description: Build the sprint ceremony infrastructure that manages all subsequent phases. Dogfooding: the PM tooling is the first thing built.

phases.name: bootstrap
phases.description: VPS provisioning, HA cluster setup, front door security, ingress, MetalLB, secrets bootstrapping, GitHub CI.

phases.name: foundations
phases.description: Crossplane compositions (PostgreSQL, namespaces, RBAC), OpenBao, network policies, cert-manager CA transition.

phases.name: gitops-engine
phases.description: GitLab (split into sub-stories), Harbor, ArgoCD Image Updater, GitLab Runners.

phases.name: autarky
phases.description: Vendor system: VENDORS.yaml, fetch, build recipes (ko/docker), deploy/rollback/backup, pipeline wiring.

phases.name: security
phases.description: Istio mTLS, OPA/Gatekeeper, Trivy Operator, Falco, OWASP ZAP.

phases.name: observability
phases.description: kube-prometheus-stack, Grafana, Loki, Thanos, Tempo, dashboards, AlertManager.

phases.name: testing-and-ha
phases.description: Selenium Grid, k6, MailHog, Chaos Mesh, HA pass across all charts, GitLab CI vendor builds.

phases.name: sovereign-pm
phases.description: Sovereign PM web app (Node.js/React) — replaces this file-based PM system. Self-hosting the sprint tooling.
